Specifies to ignore the `node_modules` directory in version control.

# Purpose
The `node_modules` directory contains all the installed dependencies for a Node.js project. It is automatically generated by the Node Package Manager (npm) when the `npm install` command is executed. This directory stores the packages and their dependencies required for the project to function correctly.
